headline: A cleaner public experience for discovery, trust, and premium conversion
intro: Camp Dream GA brings together high-end design, clear booking paths, original resource content, and SEO-ready structure in one cohesive brand experience.

items.title: Premium public experience
items.description: Warm editorial design, modern navigation, and mobile-first layouts create a more memorable first impression.

items.title: Content-led growth
items.description: The resources section is designed for original planning articles, seasonal search demand, and compliant monetization opportunities.

items.title: Mixed monetization architecture
items.description: Programs drive direct revenue while resource pages can support carefully placed ads without harming the premium feel.

items.title: Trust and compliance foundation
items.description: Policies, disclosures, canonical handling, and content depth help the site feel more complete to users, partners, and ad reviewers.
